docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING OF MAY-28-2010 - AMENDED JUDGMENT ISSUED. NO APPEARANCES BY EITHER PARTY. JUDGE JAMES J. MCBRIDE, CLERK SHAWNA VANTREE, REPORTER RITA HOWELL (206).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-28-2009 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-03-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SENT TO THE DEFENDANT JESSE VELAZCO, RETURNED "ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN/UNABLE TO FORWARD".
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR NOTICE OF INTENTION TO ISSUE AMENDED AND CORRECTED JUDGMENT AND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING SET FOR MAY-28-2010 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VELAZCO, JESSE $2,313.76 PRINCIPAL, $425.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,738.76 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VELAZCO, JESSE $2,313.76 PRINCIPAL, $400.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,713.76 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,674.72 FILED BY AUTORETURN AS TO DEFENDANT VELAZCO, JESSE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-28-2009 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM BARBARA ANSCHER FILED BY AUTORETURN VELAZCO, JESSE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $325.00) SERVED MAR-29-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT VELAZCO, JESSE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-28-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-28-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: BARBARA ANSCHER. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
ORDER FOR AMENDED JUDGMENT RE: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING OF MAY 28, 2010
